## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pytest` passes)
- [ ] Lint/format clean (`ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Docs updated in the same PR (README/docs/ as needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If the CLI changed: ran `python scripts/gen-cli-reference.py`
- [ ] If savings logic or a bundled-tool version changed: noted the **savings impact** in the changelog
